tipRules.tip: Fish Senko around spawning beds in spring
Target submerged structures and shady spots with Senko in summer
Fish Senko near baitfish schools in fall as bass feed heavily
Use slow Senko presentations near deep-water structures in winter

knowledge.insight: The Senko sinks horizontally, which is different from most soft plastics that fall nose-first. This horizontal descent triggers strikes as bass interpret it as dying or injured prey
The Senko is infused with salt which adds weight and a unique taste that encourages bass to hold onto it longer, increasing hook-up ratio
